databaseScript.purpose: Mark 648 orphaned document records as quarantined
databaseScript.instructions: Execute this SQL script against the database to complete the quarantine process

instructions: 2. Execute the following commands to restore from quarantine:
3. Run the database rollback script to unquarantine records
rollback.databaseRollback:
-- Rollback quarantined records
UPDATE documents 
SET is_quarantined = false, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP 
WHERE is_quarantined = true 
  AND updated_at >= '2025-09-16T13:03:05.560Z';
warnings: Only execute rollback if you are certain the quarantine was incorrect
Backup your database before running rollback scripts
